summary: Custom Templates feature fully tested. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified - Templates tab shows custom templates with Use/Edit/Delete buttons, Create Template form has placeholder insertion buttons, Use Template modal shows all placeholder fields dynamically with Include Signature and Include QR Stamp toggles.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/practice/templates - List custom templates
✅ POST /api/practice/templates - Create new template with name, category, content, placeholders
✅ GET /api/practice/templates/{id} - Get single template with content
✅ PUT /api/practice/templates/{id} - Update template
✅ DELETE /api/practice/templates/{id} - Delete template
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/preview - Preview template with filled placeholders
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/generate - Generate PDF from custom template
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/generate with include_signature=true - Includes signature
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/generate with include_qr_stamp=true - Includes QR stamp with verification ID
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/generate with both options - Includes both signature and QR
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/generate with save_to_vault=true - Saves to document vault
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/generate with invalid template_id - Returns 404
✅ POST /api/templates/custom/preview with invalid template_id - Returns 404
✅ Frontend: Templates tab shows custom templates list
✅ Frontend: Template card shows Use/Edit/Delete buttons
✅ Frontend: Create Template form appears with name, category, description fields
✅ Frontend: Insert Placeholder buttons present ({{client_name}}, {{client_address}}, {{advocate_name}}, {{date}}, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Template Content textarea with placeholder example
✅ Frontend: Preview button available in create form
✅ Frontend: Use Template modal shows dynamic placeholder fields
✅ Frontend: Include Signature toggle present and functional
✅ Frontend: Include QR Stamp toggle present and functional
✅ Frontend: Generate PDF button triggers document generation
seed_data_creation: Test template 'TEST_Client Engagement Letter' created and deleted during testing. Existing 'Client Engagement Letter' template available with 5 fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom templates feature fully implemented. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/practice/templates (CRUD), POST /api/templates/custom/preview, POST /api/templates/custom/generate. Frontend component: TemplatesTab in PracticeManagementPage.jsx (lines 1354-1777). Template stores content with {{placeholder}} syntax. Generate endpoint supports include_signature, include_qr_stamp, and save_to_vault options. Existing test template 'Client Engagement Letter' has 5 placeholders.

frontend_ui.templates_tab: PASS - Shows custom templates list with Use/Edit/Delete buttons
frontend_ui.create_template_form: PASS - Name, category, description, placeholder buttons, content textarea, preview button
frontend_ui.use_template_modal: PASS - Dynamic placeholder fields, Include Signature toggle, Include QR Stamp toggle, Generate PDF button
